conflicts_resolved.resolution: Resolved workshop merge conflict to the required script order: role.js, role-brief.js, role-workshop.js.

Resolved renderDossier to the Direction F shell from the integration playbook: divider, .dossier, brief mount, mode divider, workshop aside mount; calls renderBrief then renderWorkshop before wireDossier.
Adjusted renderWorkshop to render into the playbook's existing aside.workshop mount without duplicating the mode divider, while preserving fallback rendering for a plain mount.

tests_run.command: node --check role.js role-brief.js role-workshop.js app.js flowing-writes.js
tests_run.notes: Required syntax verification passed on the resolved working tree.

notes: Brief merge committed cleanly as 8edadfb. Workshop merge conflicts were resolved in the working tree by the codex lane worker; the actual `git add` + `git commit` was completed by the orchestrator out-of-sandbox as 882cfe0 (the codex sandbox blocked writes to the worktree index lock). After commit, npm ci installed root deps; full verification block re-ran cleanly: node --check passed, ats-state-bus + role-writeback-bridge tests 8/8 passed, typecheck:repo passed, lint:repo passed, test:repo 341/343 passed. The 2 failing tests in tests/draft-generation-stability.test.mjs ('ATS scorecard state is reset when modal opens in loading state', 'retry-ats-scorecard button uses current active draft text') were verified pre-existing on dossier-df/base-phase1 before any brief/workshop merges. They are not regressions from this swarm. tests/dossier-card-attrs.test.mjs is intentionally missing — owned by the dossier-df/qa (tests-screens) lane that runs next.
